sub_modules.fft16_bit_reverse: Combinational bit-reversal mapper used while loading DIT input order.
sub_modules.fft16_stage_index: Combinational radix-2 stage, butterfly-pair, and twiddle-index generator.
sub_modules.fft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient lookup table for N=16.
sub_modules.fft16_butterfly: Combinational fixed-point radix-2 complex butterfly supporting FFT and IFFT twiddle signs.
